verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We too have a theophany A body waiting in the heavens for me We cannot wait to see what Eternity will be We too have a theophany A body waiting in the heavens for me We cannot wait to see what Eternity will be

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Daddy is the token applied for me Does the Spirit abide in me I want to know for sure Mommy how are we so sure Is because we believe the prophet Malachi 4 The token is on the door We are safe forever more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now we know we have a part to play To obey all that the prophet say The token is a promise to them that obey Friends it don't matter if you're big or small Little stones are part of the building wall Believe in God today and you will find your way
